pages.raw_text:
"A settlement has been effected
yesterday by the county commits
sioners and the Great Northern
railway, with reference. to the
separation of grades onstwo of the
hree highway crossing on the new
connecting line being built by the
Great Northern to the line of the
Spokane, Portland & Seattle. The
railroad Is to build at its own ex-
pense a concrete tunnel 100 feet
long through which the Greenwood
road back of Greenwood cemetery
will pass. with the railroad run
ling overhead.


81 This improvement will cost the
Great Northern between $4,000
And $4,000. At the Lawton road
fhe railroad will erect an overhead
bridge for the highway, while the
plan of grade separation to be fol-
lowed at the Trail road crossing
% still unsettled. The railroad
asked for the privilege of a grade
crossing at the Trail road, but the
county commissioners rejected the
application, and a separation of
grades must be made there, the
same as at the other two crossings.


County Engineer Scott stood
with the commissioners in secur-
ing a practical plan of grade sepa-
ration at these dangerous cross
ings.
